---
title: "Frank Upton Anderson Morshead"
---

## Frank Upton Anderson Morshead

**Dates:** (b.1 Aug 1847 )

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

The second son of the Rev. John Philip Anderson Morshead and Alethea Yonge. [Winchester College Register]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 4th [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
